Legal Aid Immigration Clinic

Immigration legal aid appointments

Free immigration legal aid appointments for local residents.

Category: Immigration legal aid

Eligibility: Open to local residents.

Cost: Free

Required Documents: Photo ID; proof of address

Service Area: Cook County

Online/In-person: In person; Online intake

Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm

Languages: English, Spanish

400 Justice Ave, Chicago, IL 60603
312-555-0400 intake@legalaid.example.org Apply for legal help
